meaning: n.国会大厦,州议会大厦,(古罗马的)主神殿(丘比特神殿)
examples: Thousands of demonstrators rallied in front of the Capitol.
This policy had repeatedly come under strong criticism on Capitol Hill.
Thousands of striking teachers in Washington state will protest in front of the state capitol today.
Capitol Hill is not the only place in Washington where small business interests are being examined.
Thompson brought his non-campaign to Capitol Hill for a closed-door meet-and-greet with Republican lawmakers.
